# Define normalization functions
import re
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
PUNCT = re.compile(r'[\u0600-\u0605\u061B\u061E\u061F\u066A-\u066D\u06D4\u06D6-\u06ED\u06F0-\u06F9،؛؟…«»"\'\(\)\[\]\{\}\.\,\:\;\-\—\–\!\/\\]+')
SPACES = re.compile(r'\s+')

def normalize_ar(s):
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    s = TATWEEL.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = PUNCT.sub(' ', s)
    s = SPACES.sub(' ', s).strip()
    return s

snippet = "فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الرَّ"
norm_snippet = normalize_ar(snippet)
norm_snippet

# Search for ayahs containing this snippet (normalized substring)
candidates = []
for ay in quran_data:
    text = ay['ayah_text']
    if norm_snippet in normalize_ar(text):
        candidates.append(ay)
len(candidates), [(c['surah_id'], c['ayah_id'], c['surah_name'], c['ayah_text'][:60]) for c in candidates[:10]]

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # Return length of the longest common subsequence (not substring)
    # DP algorithm O(n*m) but small
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0] * (m + 1)
    for i in range(n):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(m):
            temp = dp[j+1]
            if a[i] == b[j]:
                dp[j+1] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j+1] = max(dp[j+1], dp[j])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

full_substring = "فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الرَّ"

ratio = lcs_length(full_substring, cand) / max(1, len(full_substring))
full_substring, len(full_substring), lcs_length(full_substring, cand), ratio
